runtime_policy.rule: PowerShell is acceptable for Windows-local bootstrap and orchestration. If a script grows into reusable core logic, route the decision through system/artifact-form-policy.json and consider Node.js or Python.

encoding_safety.rule: When writing Chinese text into JSON, Canvas or Markdown, use an UTF-8 safe writer path such as apply_patch, an existing UTF-8 file transform, or escaped string literals. Do not pipe new Chinese literal strings through an unverified shell-to-runtime encoding path.
encoding_safety.validation: scripts/validate-system.ps1 and scripts/validate-canvas.ps1 reject stable unreadable-text markers after writes.

future_bias: Node.js for JSON, Canvas, Markdown metadata, Obsidian and web-adjacent tooling
Python for paper processing, data pipelines, embeddings and analysis

tools.role: Build machine-readable catalog files from knowledge Markdown frontmatter.
tools.migration_trigger: Move core parsing to Node.js if frontmatter parsing, chunking, or multiple export formats become complex.

tools.role: Validate knowledge Markdown frontmatter and ids.
tools.migration_trigger: Move to Node.js if schema validation should use full JSON Schema or YAML parser behavior.

tools.role: Validate system registries, project ontology, routes, information map, closure map, visual coverage map, canvas registry, review module registration, thin entrypoint policy, project-local skills, text integrity, likely UTF-8/GBK mojibake, domain-taxonomy visual coverage and tool paths.
tools.migration_trigger: Move to Node.js if registry validation needs richer schemas and cross-file graph checks.

tools.role: Create a new knowledge item from templates.
tools.migration_trigger: Move to Node.js if template generation needs richer prompts, schema-aware defaults or interactive selection.

tools.role: Report the current status of a registered loop under the loop-orchestration system module without changing loop state or scheduling work.
tools.migration_trigger: Move to Node.js or a service runtime only if loop-orchestration gains multi-loop scheduling, richer schemas, automated run-one execution or unattended monitoring.

tools.role: Validate Canvas registry, canvas JSON files, text integrity, color semantics, stable Obsidian color token compatibility, visible color legends, current-view uniqueness, registered placement and archive/replaced_by visual retirement markers.
tools.migration_trigger: Move to Node.js if Canvas validation needs richer schema checks, graph layout checks or automatic view generation.

tools.role: Audit current and active Canvas views for visual scanability issues, including empty cards, node overlap, visible color legend readability, primary-flow edge labels, edge label clearance, cramped bridge anchors, cramped main-to-navigation gutters, edge crossings, long diagonal routing, over-routed navigation-to-content lines and visible route-card clutter.
tools.migration_trigger: Move to Node.js if visual auditing needs rendered screenshots, path finding, interactive layout repair or richer geometry metrics.

tools.role: Validate the diagnostic system protocol, diagnostic issue queue, issue schema and referenced capture or validation paths.
tools.migration_trigger: Move to Node.js if diagnosis queue validation needs full JSON Schema, richer state transitions or generated reports.

tools.role: Validate the review system protocol, specialized review modules, review queue, review docs map, review record schema and referenced paths.
tools.migration_trigger: Move to Node.js if review queue validation needs full JSON Schema, richer handoff graph checks or generated reports.

tools.role: Loop through text files one by one and report UTF-8 round-trip status, replacement characters, question placeholders, private-use characters and known UTF-8/GBK mojibake patterns.
tools.migration_trigger: Move to Node.js if text integrity auditing needs richer encoding heuristics, diff-aware changed-file selection or large binary/text classification.

tools.role: Render registered current/active Canvas views into PNG screenshot evidence and a machine-readable report, then check that the rendered artifact is non-empty and free of obvious source-text corruption markers.
tools.migration_trigger: Move the renderer to Node.js plus browser automation if Obsidian-real rendering, DOM-level screenshot comparison, OCR, or visual-diff baselines become required.

tools.role: Report local Git worktree, origin remote, branch, short status and current version-cycle state without mutating repository state.
tools.migration_trigger: Move to Node.js only if Git status reporting needs richer JSON normalization or GitHub API integration.

tools.role: Validate Git governance machine truth, docs map, origin remote, .gitignore/.gitattributes safety patterns and version-cycle closure contract.
tools.migration_trigger: Move to Node.js only if validation needs richer Git graph, branch policy or GitHub API checks.
